# Utawarerumono futari no hakuoro

name: Successful Defense
mode: once
w32 00123ECC 60000000
w32 00123EE4 60000000

name: Critical Attacks
mode: once
w32 00124120 60000000
w32 00124150 60000000
w32 00124270 60000000
w32 00124288 60000000

name: Critical Skills
mode: once
w32 001243AC 60000000
w32 001244B4 60000000
w32 001244D4 60000000

name: Max Power On Change
mode: once
w32 01164000 7CC62014
w32 01164004 80830298
w32 01164008 548437FE
w32 0116400C 2C040000
w32 01164010 41820008
w32 01164014 38C00064
w32 01164018 4810ABB6
